message:
I've been poking around with family emergency planning lately, and honestly? Having a simple plan in place takes so much of the mental load off. There's this straightforward resource from Ready.gov that walks you through the basics—nothing overwhelming, just practical steps for talking through "what if" scenarios with your household. Turns out, most of us are closer to being prepared than we think.

Do you and your family have a go-to meeting spot or communication plan, or is that still on your someday list?
